steps.title: Identify the task's central requirement
steps.content: The student wants to “specify an element's relative abundance on Earth.” “Specify” is the key word — it demands a concrete, exact statement of a particular abundance value, not a general discussion of methods.

steps.title: Find the choice that states the specific abundance
steps.content:
Option B directly specifies potassium's relative abundance using concrete data from the notes: 160 ppm or 0.016%.

Options A and C discuss methods of expressing abundance without stating any specific value, while D makes an inaccurate comparison.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
